zh.title: 币安币/美元技术分析：短期震荡整理，潜在小幅上行
zh.content:
当前BNB/USD价格在672.22附近徘徊，接近20日均线672.748，显示短期市场缺乏明显方向。价格高低波动幅度较小，仅0.03%，暗示短线多空力量相对均衡，趋势呈现横盘整理特征。若价格有效突破均线，则可能引发小幅上行动能。  

MACD指标显示主线为-1.039236，但信号线数据缺失，难以判断明显交叉信号。然而，负值区间提示短期多头动能有限，仍需关注潜在底部支撑。若MACD向零轴回升，可视为短线买入机会，但风险依旧存在。  

支撑位方面，可关注670.65附近低点，如跌破则可能引发下行压力；阻力位则在672.9附近高点，突破则有望延伸至675-678区间。结合均线位置，短期操作应以震荡交易为主，避免追高。  

交易策略上，建议观望为主，低位可适度布局逢低买入，严格止损于670以下；高位或接近阻力位则可考虑分批获利了结。总体而言，市场短期整理为主，但突破均线后或形成短线上行机会，需灵活应对行情变化。

> **[BNB Price Prediction: Binance Coin Targets $667-$670 Resistance Zone in ...](https://blockchair.com/news/bnb-price-prediction-binance-coin-targets-667670-resistance-zone-in-march-2026--fd58e4867f?utm_source=chatgpt.com)** · *Blockchair* · 2026/3/15
> Binance Coin (BNB) is trading at $661.51 as of March 15, 2026, showing resilience with a 1.25% gain over the past 24 hours. With technical indicators painting a mixed picture, this BNB price prediction examines the critical levels traders should watch in the coming weeks.
 A break above resistance could trigger momentum toward the 700 area, while failure may invite a pullback into mid-range support.  

From a trading perspective, the setup favors patience. A confirmed breakout above 675 with volume would support short-term long positions targeting higher resistance zones. Conversely, rejection at current levels combined with continued bearish MACD pressure could justify short-term downside trades toward 650. Range traders may also exploit the tight consolidation, buying near support and selling near resistance until a clear directional breakout emerges.
